ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wildlife_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "lifestage" TEXT /* Life stage of the observed animal */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the observed animal */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of observation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Decimal longitude of the observation site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Decimal latitude of the observation site */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of observation */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "sciname_cor" TEXT /* Common or alternate scientific name */,
  "massing" REAL /* Massing of the animal */,
  "length_in_mm" REAL /* Length in millimeters */,
  "bio1" REAL /* Bio1 environmental variable */,
  "bio12" REAL /* Bio12 environmental variable */,
  "bio4" REAL /* Bio4 environmental variable */,
  "bio15" REAL /* Bio15 environmental variable */,
  "seasonality" TEXT /* Seasonality of the observation */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Exact date of the observation */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the observation */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of any images taken during the observation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the observation */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the observation was made */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wildlife_observations_scientific_name FOREIGN KEY ("scientific_name") REFERENCES species ("scientific_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wildlife_observations_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wildlife_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wildlife_observations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family to which the species belongs */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the species */,
  "migration_pattern" TEXT /* Migration patterns of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Decimal longitude of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Decimal latitude of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat at the location */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Land use at the location */,
  "last_visited" TEXT /* Date when the location was last visited for observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of environmental factors */,
  "bio1" REAL /* Bio1 variable associated with the observation */,
  "bio12" REAL /* Bio12 variable associated with the observation */,
  "bio4" REAL /* Bio4 variable associated with the observation */,
  "bio15" REAL /* Bio15 variable associated with the observation */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of the observation */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of the observation */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation at the time of the observation */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of the observation */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation related to the environmental factors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_factors_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES wildlife_observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "life_stages" (
  "lifestage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each life stage */,
  "lifestage" TEXT /* Description of the life stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifestage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex_categories" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Description of the sex category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_seasonality" (
  "seasonality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seasonality record */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation related to the seasonality */,
  "season" TEXT /* Description of the season during the observation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seasonality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_seasonality_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES wildlife_observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation related to historical data */,
  "bio1_2yr" REAL /* Bio1 value from 2 years ago */,
  "bio12_2yr" REAL /* Bio12 value from 2 years ago */,
  "bio4_2yr" REAL /* Bio4 value from 2 years ago */,
  "bio15_2yr" REAL /* Bio15 value from 2 years ago */,
  "bio1_5yr" REAL /* Bio1 value from 5 years ago */,
  "bio12_5yr" REAL /* Bio12 value from 5 years ago */,
  "bio4_5yr" REAL /* Bio4 value from 5 years ago */,
  "bio15_5yr" REAL /* Bio15 value from 5 years ago */,
  "bio1_10yr" REAL /* Bio1 value from 10 years ago */,
  "bio12_10yr" REAL /* Bio12 value from 10 years ago */,
  "bio4_10yr" REAL /* Bio4 value from 10 years ago */,
  "bio15_10yr" REAL /* Bio15 value from 10 years ago */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES wildlife_observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, field technician, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES wildlife_observations ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
